series_metadata.series_title: Policy Guidance, Toolkits, and related information.
series_metadata.series_description: Documents related to policy implementation and guidance from DODD including Toolkits, guidance published on-line or provided to stakeholders.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically, then recycle. ; Electronic: Retain for 3 years after discontinuance of the policy then contact State Archives for review and possible transfer. Dispose of if not transferred.., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
